title: Will It Blow? — Greenfield Completion
description: Complete PRD for all remaining work: architecture modernization (Koota ECS, expo-sqlite, config extraction), missing UI, engine modules, tests, and deployment.

tasks.title: Config JSON extraction
tasks.description: Extract all hardcoded tunables from station components and engine modules into 16 JSON config files with typed TypeScript accessors. Create src/config/*.json files for: stations, sausage, grinder, stuffer, stove, chopping, blowout, scoring, demands, dialogue, ingredients, difficulty (exists), camera, audio, ui, rounds. Each JSON gets a .ts accessor with interface and lookup functions. Import pattern: `import config from './config.json' with { type: 'json' }`. Write unit tests for each accessor FIRST (TDD). Verify zero hardcoded magic numbers remain in src/components/stations/ after extraction.

tasks.title: Koota ECS world setup
tasks.description: Set up Koota ECS with createWorld(), define all trait schemas in src/ecs/traits.ts (StationTrait, SausageTrait, GrinderTrait, StufferTrait, StoveTrait, ChopperTrait, BlowoutTrait, IngredientTrait, DemandTrait, ScoreTrait, RoundTrait, PlayerTrait, PhaseTag). Create queries in src/ecs/queries.ts. Create actions in src/ecs/actions.ts using createActions(). Wrap R3F Canvas in WorldProvider. Write unit tests FIRST for trait creation, entity spawn, query results. Station components should use useTrait/useQuery to read state.

tasks.title: Zustand store migration to thin UI bridge
tasks.description: Reduce Zustand store to thin UI bridge. Remove dead fields (dialogueActive, currentDialogueLine). Type finalScore properly (not any). Move station gameplay fields (groundMeatVol, stuffLevel, cookLevel, casingTied) to Koota traits. Keep only: appPhase, UI input state (joystick, lookDelta, interactPulse), dialogue transient state. Add returnToMenu() action. Add startNewGame() action that spawns Koota entities from config. Rewrite all existing store tests FIRST to match new API.

tasks.title: expo-sqlite persistence layer
tasks.description: Create src/db/schema.ts with Drizzle ORM tables: game_session, round_scores, used_combos, player_stats, settings. Create src/db/client.ts that initializes expo-sqlite with openDatabaseSync('willitblow.db'), runs CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS migrations, wraps in drizzle(). Returns null on web if WASM unavailable. Create src/db/queries.ts with hydrateSession() and persistSession(). COI service worker already in public/. Metro config already has WASM + COEP/COOP headers. Write tests FIRST for schema creation, hydration round-trip, web fallback.

tasks.title: ChallengeRegistry module
tasks.description: Create src/engine/ChallengeRegistry.ts (pure logic, no React). Map each of 13 GamePhase values to challenge config entry. Implement seeded variant selection: (seed * 2654435761) >>> 0 % length. Implement calculateFinalVerdict(scores, demandBonus) returning rank S/A/B/F using thresholds from scoring.json. Write tests FIRST: variant determinism, rank thresholds (S≥92, A≥75, B≥50, F<50), edge cases, all phases mapped.

tasks.title: SausagePhysics scoring module
tasks.description: Create src/engine/SausagePhysics.ts with 5 pure scoring functions: calculateBlowRuffalos(holdDuration, ingredients), checkBurst(ingredients) probabilistic check, calculateTasteRating(ingredients, burstOccurred), calculateFinalScore(taste, blow, burst, bonus), getTitleTier(score) mapping 0-100 to rank name. All functions read ingredient stats from ingredients.json config. Write tests FIRST for all 5 functions including edge cases.

tasks.title: Asset URL resolution module
tasks.description: Create src/engine/assetUrl.ts. Implement getWebBasePath() that derives base path from document script tags or experiments.baseUrl (/will-it-blow/). Implement getAssetUrl(relativePath) returning full URL. Update ALL GLB, OGG, and texture references in components to use getAssetUrl(). Must work on localhost (no prefix) and GitHub Pages (/will-it-blow/ prefix). Write tests FIRST for both environments using mocked document.scripts.

tasks.title: GameOrchestrator phase completeness
tasks.description: Fix GameOrchestrator.tsx PHASES array to include all 13 GamePhase values (add TIE_CASING and BLOWOUT). Ensure phase transitions work for all 13 phases via dev shortcuts and gameplay triggers. Score calculation triggers on DONE phase. Demand generation happens on mount. Write tests FIRST for phase navigation (forward/backward through all 13 phases).

tasks.title: GameOverScreen (results)
tasks.description: Create src/components/ui/GameOverScreen.tsx. Display rank badge (S/A/B/F) with rank-specific colors and titles. Show per-challenge score breakdown. Show demand bonus details. 'PLAY AGAIN' button calls startNewGame(). 'MENU' button calls returnToMenu(). Update App.tsx to render GameOverScreen when appPhase === 'results'. Write tests FIRST: renders with mock scores, buttons trigger correct actions.

tasks.title: LoadingScreen
tasks.description: Create src/components/ui/LoadingScreen.tsx. Show progress bar during kitchen.glb and audio preload. Transition to playing when all assets ready. Update App.tsx to render LoadingScreen between title and playing phases. Write tests FIRST: progress updates correctly, transition triggers on completion.

tasks.title: Per-station HUD overlays
tasks.description: Create 4 HUD components: src/components/ui/GrindingHUD.tsx (speed zone indicator, timer, progress), StuffingHUD.tsx (pressure gauge, fill progress, burst counter), CookingHUD.tsx (temperature gauge, time in zone, heat control), BlowoutHUD.tsx (pressure gauge, tie progress, score). ALL HUDs are read-only — ZERO input handling. Read from Koota traits via useTrait hooks. Write tests FIRST for each HUD's display logic.

tasks.title: Challenge UI components
tasks.description: Create 3 shared UI components: src/components/ui/ChallengeHeader.tsx ('CHALLENGE N/7' with phase name), StrikeCounter.tsx (visual red X marks, max from ui.json config), ProgressGauge.tsx (animated 0-100 progress bar). Read game phase from Koota traits. Write tests FIRST for each component.

tasks.title: IngredientChallenge overlay
tasks.description: Create src/components/ui/IngredientChallenge.tsx — ingredient selection overlay using bridge pattern. Show available ingredients from Koota query. Correct pick: slide forward animation + score update. Wrong pick: strike + red flash. Score = (correct / required) × 100 minus strike penalty. Write to Koota ScoreTrait. Write tests FIRST for scoring logic and pick validation.

tasks.title: TastingChallenge overlay
tasks.description: Create src/components/ui/TastingChallenge.tsx — verdict reveal overlay. Reveal phases: form → ingredients → cook → scores with demand breakdown. Rank-specific dialogue from Mr. Sausage. Rank badge animation (S/A/B/F). On completion, set appPhase to 'results'. Uses ChallengeRegistry.calculateFinalVerdict() and SausagePhysics scoring. Write tests FIRST for reveal sequence and rank display.

tasks.title: RoundTransition UI
tasks.description: Create src/components/ui/RoundTransition.tsx — between-round screen. Show round score summary, round number. 'NEXT ROUND' button advances via Koota action. Read round state from Koota RoundTrait. Write tests FIRST: renders round info, button triggers nextRound.

tasks.title: ChestFreezer interactivity
tasks.description: Make ChestFreezer.tsx fully interactive. Add ingredient meshes with onClick handlers. Render ingredients from ingredients.json config. Selected ingredients highlight with emissive pulse and slide forward on Z. Write selected IDs to Koota IngredientTrait entities. 3 ingredients required (configurable in ui.json). Add physics lid animation (open/close). Write tests FIRST for selection logic.

tasks.title: Kitchen.tsx GLB loading
tasks.description: Replace Kitchen.tsx empty fragment stub with actual GLB loading. Use useGLTF with getAssetUrl('/models/kitchen.glb'). Apply PBR materials from texture sets. Set up lighting: ambient, hemisphere, point lights with procedural flicker animation. Write integration test with mocked useGLTF verifying scene graph is populated.

tasks.title: CRT shader for TV
tasks.description: Create src/components/effects/CrtShader.ts using TSL NodeMaterial. Effects: barrel distortion, scanlines, chromatic aberration, flicker, vignette. Export createCrtMaterial(name) factory. Uniforms: time, flickerIntensity, staticIntensity, reactionIntensity. Update TV.tsx to use CRT material on screen mesh. Write tests FIRST for material creation and uniform presence.

tasks.title: Audio platform split
tasks.description: Split AudioEngine into platform-specific files. src/engine/AudioEngine.web.ts: Tone.js synthesis + Howler OGG playback. src/engine/AudioEngine.ts: Native stub using expo-audio. Audio config from audio.json (sample paths, volumes, synth params). Wire station-specific SFX: chop, grind, squelch, sizzle, pressure, burst. Add ambient horror drone during gameplay. Volume controllable from settings (persisted in SQLite). Write tests FIRST for audio interface (mock Tone.js).

tasks.title: Fix existing failing tests
tasks.description: Fix all 10 currently failing tests. Rewrite gameStore.test.ts to match actual store API (after US-1.3 migration). Fix SurrealText.spec.tsx Babel import issue. Remove App.tsx console.error blanket suppression. Achieve 100% pass rate on existing test suite. Verify no console.error suppression of real React errors.

tasks.title: Station component tests
tasks.description: Write R3F tests for all 9 station components using @react-three/test-renderer: Grinder, Stuffer, Stove, ChoppingBlock, BlowoutStation, TV, Sink, ChestFreezer, PhysicsFreezerChest. Each test verifies: mesh presence, trait reading, user interaction response. Mock useGLTF where needed.

tasks.title: Engine module tests
tasks.description: Write unit tests for all engine modules: ChallengeRegistry (variant selection, verdict calculation), SausagePhysics (all 5 scoring functions), assetUrl (both deployment environments), DialogueEngine effects system (hint/taunt/stall/anger). Write tests for Koota integration: trait creation, entity spawn/destroy, query results. Write tests for Drizzle integration: schema creation, hydration, persistence round-trip. Write tests for config accessors: typed lookups, schema validation. Each test file tests a single module.

tasks.title: E2E playthrough test
tasks.description: Create e2e/playthrough.spec.ts — full game loop E2E test. Exercise: title → playing → all 13 phases → results → menu. Use GameGovernor (window.__gov) for phase advancement. Verify score display, rank badge, and menu return. Run headed with system Chrome (WebGL support). Add CI integration (runs on push to feat/** branches).

tasks.title: GitHub Pages deployment fix
tasks.description: Verify game deploys correctly to GitHub Pages. assetUrl.ts handles /will-it-blow/ base path. COI service worker enables SharedArrayBuffer for expo-sqlite WASM. All binary assets (GLB, OGG, textures) load correctly. expo-sqlite WASM works in deployed environment. CD workflow builds and deploys successfully. Manual verification: play full game loop on https://arcade-cabinet.github.io/will-it-blow/.

tasks.title: CI pipeline update
tasks.description: Update CI to run all test suites. Jobs: lint (Biome), typecheck (pnpm typecheck), unit tests (pnpm test), E2E tests (playwright). All jobs must pass with green status. Test count must exceed 150 (from current 62). Biome lint must have zero warnings. TypeScript must have zero errors.

tasks.title: Console suppression cleanup
tasks.description: Remove App.tsx console.error blanket override. Identify root cause of 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error (likely a useEffect dependency loop or Zustand subscription cycle). Fix the actual bug rather than suppressing the warning. If some Three.js warnings are unfixable, use a targeted filter (regex matching specific Three.js messages only), not blanket suppression.

tasks.title: DialogueEngine effects system
tasks.description: Make DialogueEngine effects system functional. Effects (hint, taunt, stall, anger) must produce observable state changes in Koota traits. Station components react to active effects (e.g., hint glow on matching ingredients, stall slows timer). Write tests FIRST for all 4 effect types.

tasks.title: Settings screen
tasks.description: Create src/components/ui/SettingsScreen.tsx. SFX volume slider, music volume slider, haptics toggle. Settings persisted to SQLite settings table via src/db/queries.ts. Accessible from title screen and in-game pause menu. Write tests FIRST for settings read/write round-trip.
